query:
INSERT INTO broadcast_schedules (broadcast_id, title, description, scheduled_start_time, scheduled_end_time, status, broadcast_type, channels, autonomous_scheduling, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES
('bs-morning-gospel', 'Morning Gospel Hour', 'Start the day with uplifting gospel music and inspirational messages', '2026-02-10 06:00:00', '2026-02-10 08:00:00', 'scheduled', 'radio', '["website","youtube"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-legacy-stories', 'Legacy Stories', 'Stories from the Rockin Rockin Boogie legacy - family history and achievements', '2026-02-10 08:00:00', '2026-02-10 09:00:00', 'scheduled', 'podcast', '["website","youtube","facebook"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-little-richard', 'Little Richard Connection', 'Music and stories celebrating the Little Richard connection', '2026-02-10 09:00:00', '2026-02-10 10:00:00', 'scheduled', 'radio', '["website","youtube"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-midday-mix', 'Midday Music Mix', 'A curated mix of R&B, soul, and gospel classics', '2026-02-10 10:00:00', '2026-02-10 12:00:00', 'scheduled', 'radio', '["website"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-sweet-miracles', 'Sweet Miracles Hour', 'Updates from Sweet Miracles NPO - community impact stories', '2026-02-10 12:00:00', '2026-02-10 13:00:00', 'scheduled', 'podcast', '["website","youtube","facebook"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-soul-sessions', 'Afternoon Soul Sessions', 'Deep cuts and rare tracks from the soul and R&B archives', '2026-02-10 13:00:00', '2026-02-10 15:00:00', 'scheduled', 'radio', '["website"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-hybridcast-live', 'HybridCast Live', 'Live broadcast via HybridCast - community voices and emergency updates', '2026-02-10 15:00:00', '2026-02-10 16:00:00', 'scheduled', 'live', '["website","youtube","twitch","facebook"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-healing-freq', 'Healing Frequencies', '432Hz and 528Hz healing frequency sessions for wellness', '2026-02-10 16:00:00', '2026-02-10 17:00:00', 'scheduled', 'streaming', '["website"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-evening-jazz', 'Evening Jazz & Blues', 'Smooth jazz and blues for the evening wind-down', '2026-02-10 17:00:00', '2026-02-10 19:00:00', 'scheduled', 'radio', '["website"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-canryn-showcase', 'Canryn Production Showcase', 'Featuring productions from Canryn Production and subsidiaries', '2026-02-10 19:00:00', '2026-02-10 20:00:00', 'scheduled', 'podcast', '["website","youtube"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-night-meditation', 'Night Meditation', 'Guided meditation with healing frequencies for restful sleep', '2026-02-10 20:00:00', '2026-02-10 22:00:00', 'scheduled', 'streaming', '["website"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-late-night', 'Late Night Classics', 'Classic R&B and soul through the night hours', '2026-02-10 22:00:00', '2026-02-11 06:00:00', 'scheduled', 'radio', '["website"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-sunday-service', 'Sunday Service', 'Sunday morning worship and gospel celebration', '2026-02-15 08:00:00', '2026-02-15 11:00:00', 'scheduled', 'live', '["website","youtube","facebook","instagram"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-family-achieve', 'Family Achievement Hour', 'Celebrating family achievements and milestones', '2026-02-14 14:00:00', '2026-02-14 15:00:00', 'scheduled', 'podcast', '["website","youtube"]', 1, NOW(), NOW()),
('bs-emergency', 'Emergency Broadcast Channel', 'Reserved for emergency alerts and community safety updates', '2026-02-10 00:00:00', '2026-02-10 23:59:59', 'scheduled', 'live', '["website","youtube","twitch","facebook","instagram"]', 1, NOW(), NOW());
